title: Snowfall SMP S4 Official Modpack
description: A cozy survival-focused modpack with Create, Farmer’s Delight, and rustic adventure vibes—perfect for SMPs with friends.
body:
**Snowfall SMP: Season 4** is the official modpack for our Minnesota friend server, but it’s also built so anyone can vibe with it. Think of it as survival Minecraft, but upgraded to feel more alive, more immersive, and a little more “cabin in the woods.”

At its core, Snowfall leans into rustic survival. We’ve curated a mix of mods that make the world feel richer and more rewarding without losing that vanilla charm. Chop wood, build cabins, farm good food, and actually want to go exploring.

**Key highlights:**

Create Mod – For all your wild contraptions, automation, and steampunk brainrot.

Farmer’s Delight + addons – Cooking, farming, and cozy food culture that makes survival feel rewarding.

Rustic & atmospheric mods – Tweaks and add-ons that give the world a woodsy, lived-in vibe.

Performance & QoL upgrades – Optimized for smoother multiplayer and less tech headache.

Why download it?

You want a pack that feels familiar yet fresh.

You’re into survival but also like a touch of creativity and engineering.

You want the “hang out with friends on a server” vibe—even if you’re solo.

This isn’t a grind-heavy kitchen sink pack. It’s not about flashy tech tiers or hundreds of questlines. Snowfall is about chilling with friends, building something cool, and making memories—whether you’re on our SMP or starting your own.
